email_subject: Sollicitatie — Internship in Customer sales advisor
email_body:
Beste mevrouw, mijnheer,

Met veel enthousiasme solliciteer ik naar de stage als Customer sales advisor bij Robert Bosch NV/SA. Uw oproep voor een teamspeler met probleemoplossend vermogen en een gezonde dosis humor spreekt me aan.

In mijn huidige rol als junior digital marketer bij Episto ben ik het aanspreekpunt voor klanten en interne teams, beheer ik orders en opvolging, en analyseer ik prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush. Daarnaast heb ik via mijn project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data en technische audits, wat mijn analytische vaardigheden versterkt. Mijn achtergrond in logistiek bij Katoen Natie heeft me stressbestendig en klantgericht gemaakt.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik ben leergierig, sociaal en klaar om bij te dragen aan uw team.

Graag licht ik mijn motivatie toe in een gesprek.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam, Sir,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Internship in Customer sales advisor at Robert Bosch NV/SA. Your call for a team player with problem-solving skills and a healthy dose of humor appeals to me.

In my current role as junior digital marketer at Episto, I am the point of contact for customers and internal teams, manage orders and follow-up, and analyze performance using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush. Additionally, through my project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data and technical audits, strengthening my analytical skills. My background in logistics at Katoen Natie has made me stress-resistant and customer-oriented.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I am eager to learn, sociable, and ready to contribute to your team.

I would be happy to explain my motivation in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste mevrouw, mijnheer,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Internship in Customer sales advisor bij Robert Bosch NV/SA. Uw oproep voor een teamspeler met probleemoplossend vermogen, stressbestendigheid en een gezonde dosis humor sluit naadloos aan bij mijn profiel.

Momenteel werk ik als junior digital marketer bij Episto, waar ik fungeer als aanspreekpunt voor klanten en interne afdelingen. Ik beheer orders, volg leveringen op en zorg voor een vlotte communicatie per e-mail en telefoon. Daarnaast analyseer ik prestaties met tools zoals Google Analytics en SEMrush, en bereid ik rapporten voor die inzicht geven in de klanttevredenheid. Deze ervaring heeft mijn klantgerichte en analytische vaardigheden versterkt.

Mijn achtergrond in logistiek bij Katoen Natie heeft mij geleerd om in een snelle omgeving accuraat en efficiënt te werken, wat mij stressbestendig maakt. Ook heb ik via mijn project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met gestructureerde data en technische audits, wat mijn probleemoplossend vermogen verder heeft ontwikkeld.

Ik beheers MS Office vloeiend, met goede Excel-vaardigheden. Mijn communicatie in het Engels en Turks is professioneel, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Frans leer ik graag bij indien nodig.

Ik ben sociaal, leergierig en klaar om bij te dragen aan de projecten en klantprocessen bij Bosch. Ik hoop mijn motivatie in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear Madam, Sir,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Internship in Customer sales advisor at Robert Bosch NV/SA. Your call for a team player with problem-solving skills, stress resistance, and a healthy dose of humor perfectly matches my profile.

Currently, I work as a junior digital marketer at Episto, where I act as a point of contact for customers and internal departments. I manage orders, follow up on shipments, and ensure smooth communication via email and phone. Additionally, I analyze performance using tools like Google Analytics and SEMrush, and prepare reports that provide insights into customer satisfaction. This experience has strengthened my customer-oriented and analytical skills.

My background in logistics at Katoen Natie taught me to work accurately and efficiently in a fast-paced environment, making me stress-resistant. Also, through my project mirook.com, I gained experience with structured data and technical audits, further developing my problem-solving abilities.

I am fluent in MS Office, with good Excel skills. My communication in English and Turkish is professional, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I am happy to learn French if needed.

I am sociable, eager to learn, and ready to contribute to projects and customer processes at Bosch. I hope to explain my motivation further in an interview.

Kind regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Customer-facing experience: point of contact for clients and internal teams, managing orders and follow-up
- Analytical skills: performance monitoring and reporting using Google Analytics, SEMrush, and Excel
- Logistics background: worked in high-volume warehouse/logistics environment at Katoen Natie
- Problem-solving: technical SEO audits and structured data implementation on mirook.com
- Languages: fluent English and Turkish, B1 Dutch (actively improving), French is a plus
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Customer service & communication: point of contact for clients, order management, follow-up, phone/email communication
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads, performance monitoring
- MS Office: Excel, PowerPoint, Word (fluent)
- Problem-solving: technical SEO audits, structured data, creative solutions
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1), French (basic)
- Social: social media content & integration
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
